summary: Phase C.5: Quick Reorder - Complete Testing. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (1 skipped). Reorder API validates products, re-runs pricing engine, returns cart_items with promo info, handles unavailable products with warnings. Frontend: Orders page shows Reorder buttons with correct data-testid, clicking Reorder shows notification, cart drawer works with quantity controls and checkout button. Account Cart page reads from CartDrawerContext correctly. Phase E (Discount Requests) verified working: Admin page shows KPIs (11 total, 7 pending, 2 approved, 2 rejected), filters, and table.

integration_issues.issue: Cart items don't persist across full page reloads - this is expected behavior as CartDrawerContext uses React state (useState) without localStorage persistence. Cart works correctly within SPA navigation.
integration_issues.severity: INFO - Design decision, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: CartDrawerContext uses in-memory state - cart items are lost on page reload. Consider adding localStorage persistence if cart persistence across sessions is required.
seed_data_creation: Test discount request created during backend testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C.5 Quick Reorder is complete. Key points: 1) POST /api/customer/orders/{order_id}/reorder validates products, re-runs pricing via resolve_checkout_item_price, returns cart_items with promo_applied/promo_label fields. 2) Most existing orders reference old product_ids that no longer exist - reorder returns warnings for these (expected behavior). 3) Reorder button has data-testid='reorder-btn-{order_id}' on each order row. 4) Reorder notification appears with success/warning/error styling. 5) AccountCartPage reads from CartDrawerContext (not hardcoded). 6) Cart drawer shows items with quantity controls, remove button, subtotal, VAT, total, and Proceed to Checkout button. 7) Phase E Discount Requests verified working - admin page shows KPIs and table.

backend_reorder_api.POST /api/customer/orders/{order_id}/reo: PASS - Returns cart_items, warnings, added_count, skipped_count, source_order
backend_reorder_api.Cart item structure: PASS - Has product_id, name, quantity, unit_price, subtotal, promo_applied, promo_label
backend_reorder_api.Pricing engine integration: PASS - Uses resolve_checkout_item_price for current pricing

frontend_cart_page.Empty state: PASS - Shows 'Your cart is empty' with Browse Marketplace and My Orders buttons
frontend_cart_page.Cart drawer: PASS - Shows items with quantity controls, remove, subtotal, VAT, total, checkout button

frontend_admin_discount_requests.KPI row: PASS - Shows Total, Pending, Approved, Rejected
frontend_admin_discount_requests.Filters: PASS - All, Pending, Approved, Rejected buttons
frontend_admin_discount_requests.Table: PASS - Shows discount requests with all columns
